nasb.text: For this is not for the ease of others and for your affliction, but by way of equality—

esv.text: For I do not mean that others should be eased and you burdened, but that as a matter of fairness

cnv.text: 這不是要別人輕省，你們受累，而是要大家都均等。

ccb.text: 这不是说要别人脱离困境，要你们陷入困境，乃是要均平。

csbs.text: 其实我这样说不是为了让别人轻松、你们为难，而是为了公平——
